SPIN.name: SPIN Selling
SPIN.description: A consultative selling methodology focused on asking the right questions

Situation.description: Questions about the prospect's current situation
examples: What tools are you using for [task]?
How is your team structured around [function]?

Problem.description: Questions that uncover problems or difficulties
examples: What challenges are you facing with [current solution]?
How much time does your team spend on [manual task]?

Implication.description: Questions about the consequences of the problem
examples: How does this impact your team's productivity?
What does this cost you in terms of revenue/time?
How does this affect your ability to scale?

Need-Payoff.description: Questions about the value of solving the problem
examples: How would it help if you could automate this process?
What would it mean for your team to save X hours per week?
How would solving this impact your quarterly goals?

BANT.name: BANT Qualification
BANT.description: Framework for qualifying leads based on Budget, Authority, Need, and Timeline

Budget.description: Does the prospect have budget allocated?
qualification_questions: What's your budget for solving this problem?
Have you allocated funds for this initiative?
What's the cost of not solving this issue?
Who else is involved in this decision?
What's your role in the evaluation process?
Who has final approval on this?

Need.description: Does the prospect have a clear need?
qualification_questions: What happens if you don't solve this?
How critical is this to your business?

Timeline.description: When does the prospect need a solution?
qualification_questions: When do you need this implemented?
Are there any upcoming deadlines or events?

MEDDIC.name: MEDDIC Sales Process
MEDDIC.description: Enterprise sales methodology for complex B2B deals

Decision_Process.description: Steps to make a purchase decision

initial_outreach.goal: Get a response and start a conversation

qualification.goal: Determine if prospect is a good fit

discovery.goal: Understand deep needs and pain points
